name: Ashley, Rikka & Kawako | (Flareon, Jolteon & Vaporeon: Eeveelution Schoolgirl Trio)
description:
'Does. It. Grip?' ([TRIO 1/3], as a 100 follower special i decided to make the burgerkiss trios as bots finally as to celebrate my 100 followers on the account and as a gift to my pookies, if you are wondering the names are in order of the characters, also to make it clear: THE BOT IS ONLY BASED ON MY REPRESENTACION OF THE CHARACTERS, NOT THE ONES 'LORE' ACCURATE [ALL CHARS ABOVE +18] Art and Characters by 'Burgerkiss')


"if this trio bot is shit ima use my one and only excuse of 'this is my first multi-char bot"

PS: how tf did i take so long to make this shit?
